_schema.description: Stream graph data: time-series values for multiple categories. Values are a relative index (0–100 scale). Years and series values must be parallel arrays of the same length.

fields.years: number[] — x-axis time points (integers, in order)
fields.series[].id: string — unique key, must match COLORS lookup in JS
fields.series[].label: string — display name in legend and tooltip
fields.series[].values: number[] — one value per year, parallel to years array. Can be absolute counts or a normalised index. Stream graph does not require values to sum to a constant per time point.

_schema.replace: Swap years and series values with real data. The stack layout handles all baseline computations. For the 'normalised' mode to be meaningful, values should represent quantities of the same type across categories. Add a matching entry to the COLORS object in the JS if adding a new series id.
